name: @yesoreyeram/grafana-plugin-tools
description: Shared templates and configuration distributed to Grafana plugin repositories via registry.json. Not a buildable package; the files under local/ and templates/ are consumed by the shadcn-style registry.

scripts.build: echo "plugin-tools ships template assets; nothing to build"
scripts.typecheck: echo "plugin-tools ships template assets; nothing to typecheck"
scripts.test: echo "plugin-tools ships template assets; nothing to test"
